benchmarks.name: Recursive Fibonacci
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To fib (n: Int) -> Int:
    If n is less than 2:
        Return n.
    Return fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2).

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Show fib(n).

benchmarks.name: N-Queens
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To solve (row: Int, cols: Int, diag1: Int, diag2: Int, n: Int) -> Int:
    If row equals n:
        Return 1.
    Let all be (1 shifted left by n) - 1.
    Let mutable available be all and not (cols or diag1 or diag2).
    Let mutable count be 0.
    While available is not 0:
        Let bit be available and (0 - available).
        Set available to available xor bit.
        Set count to count + solve(row + 1, cols or bit, (diag1 or bit) shifted left by 1, (diag2 or bit) shifted right by 1, n).
    Return count.

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Show solve(0, 0, 0, 0, n).

benchmarks.name: Fannkuch Redux
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable perm1 be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable count be a new Seq of Int.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push i to perm1.
    Push 0 to count.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable maxFlips be 0.
Let mutable checksum be 0.
Let mutable permCount be 0.
Let mutable r be n.
Let mutable done be 0.
While done equals 0:
    While r is greater than 1:
        Set item r of count to r.
        Set r to r - 1.
    Let mutable perm be a new Seq of Int.
    Set i to 1.
    While i is at most n:
        Push item i of perm1 to perm.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Let mutable flips be 0.
    While item 1 of perm is not 0:
        Let k be item 1 of perm + 1.
        Let mutable lo be 1.
        Let mutable hi be k.
        While lo is less than hi:
            Let tmp be item lo of perm.
            Set item lo of perm to item hi of perm.
            Set item hi of perm to tmp.
            Set lo to lo + 1.
            Set hi to hi - 1.
        Set flips to flips + 1.
    If flips is greater than maxFlips:
        Set maxFlips to flips.
    If permCount % 2 equals 0:
        Set checksum to checksum + flips.
    Otherwise:
        Set checksum to checksum - flips.
    Set permCount to permCount + 1.
    Set done to 1.
    While done equals 1:
        If r equals n:
            Set done to 2.
        Otherwise:
            Let perm0 be item 1 of perm1.
            Set i to 1.
            While i is at most r:
                Set item i of perm1 to item (i + 1) of perm1.
                Set i to i + 1.
            Set item (r + 1) of perm1 to perm0.
            Set item (r + 1) of count to (item (r + 1) of count) - 1.
            If item (r + 1) of count is greater than 0:
                Set done to 0.
            Otherwise:
                Set r to r + 1.
Show checksum.
Show maxFlips.

benchmarks.name: GCD Sum
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To gcd (a: Int, b: Int) -> Int:
    Let mutable x be a.
    Let mutable y be b.
    While y is greater than 0:
        Let temp be y.
        Set y to x % y.
        Set x to temp.
    Return x.

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable sum be 0.
Let mutable i be 1.
While i is at most n:
    Let mutable j be i.
    While j is at most n:
        Set sum to sum + gcd(i, j).
        Set j to j + 1.
    Set i to i + 1.
Show sum.

benchmarks.name: Binary Trees
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To makeCheck (depth: Int) -> Int:
    If depth equals 0:
        Return 1.
    Return 1 + makeCheck(depth - 1) + makeCheck(depth - 1).

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let minDepth be 4.
Let mutable maxDepth be n.
If minDepth + 2 is greater than maxDepth:
    Set maxDepth to minDepth + 2.

Let stretchCheck be makeCheck(maxDepth + 1).
Show "stretch tree of depth " + (maxDepth + 1) + " check: " + stretchCheck.

Let longLived be makeCheck(maxDepth).

Let mutable depth be minDepth.
While depth is at most maxDepth:
    Let mutable iterations be 1.
    Let mutable p be 0.
    While p is less than maxDepth - depth + minDepth:
        Set iterations to iterations * 2.
        Set p to p + 1.
    Let mutable totalCheck be 0.
    Let mutable i be 0.
    While i is less than iterations:
        Set totalCheck to totalCheck + makeCheck(depth).
        Set i to i + 1.
    Show "" + iterations + " trees of depth " + depth + " check: " + totalCheck.
    Set depth to depth + 2.
Show "long lived tree of depth " + maxDepth + " check: " + longLived.

benchmarks.name: Spectral Norm
benchmarks.logos_source:
## To native args () -> Seq of Text
## To native parseInt (s: Text) -> Int

## To aVal (i: Int, j: Int) -> Float:
    Return 1.0 / ((i + j) * (i + j + 1) / 2 + i + 1).

## To mulAv (n: Int, v: Seq of Float, out: Seq of Float) -> Seq of Float:
    Let mutable result be out.
    Let mutable i be 0.
    While i is less than n:
        Let mutable sum be 0.0.
        Let mutable j be 0.
        While j is less than n:
            Set sum to sum + aVal(i, j) * item (j + 1) of v.
            Set j to j + 1.
        Set item (i + 1) of result to sum.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Return result.

## To mulAtv (n: Int, v: Seq of Float, out: Seq of Float) -> Seq of Float:
    Let mutable result be out.
    Let mutable i be 0.
    While i is less than n:
        Let mutable sum be 0.0.
        Let mutable j be 0.
        While j is less than n:
            Set sum to sum + aVal(j, i) * item (j + 1) of v.
            Set j to j + 1.
        Set item (i + 1) of result to sum.
        Set i to i + 1.
    Return result.

## To mulAtav (n: Int, v: Seq of Float, result: Seq of Float, tmp: Seq of Float) -> Seq of Float:
    Let t be mulAv(n, v, tmp).
    Return mulAtv(n, t, result).

## Main
Let arguments be args().
Let n be parseInt(item 2 of arguments).
Let mutable u be a new Seq of Float.
Let mutable v be a new Seq of Float.
Let mutable tmp be a new Seq of Float.
Let mutable i be 0.
While i is less than n:
    Push 1.0 to u.
    Push 0.0 to v.
    Push 0.0 to tmp.
    Set i to i + 1.
Set i to 0.
While i is less than 10:
    Set v to mulAtav(n, u, v, tmp).
    Set u to mulAtav(n, v, u, tmp).
    Set i to i + 1.
Let mutable vbv be 0.0.
Let mutable vv be 0.0.
Set i to 1.
While i is at most n:
    Set vbv to vbv + item i of u * item i of v.
    Set vv to vv + item i of v * item i of v.
    Set i to i + 1.
Let result be sqrt(vbv / vv).
Show "{result:.9}".
